case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. FRANCISCO J. MARTINEZ et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO J. $6,126.66 PRINCIPAL, $1,725.50 INTEREST, $262.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,114.16, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED JUN-17-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO J.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO J. DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-23-2010
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $262.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO J.
